annual_rate.notes: Prejudgment interest under Ohio Rev. Code 1343.03 — 7% (simple interest). This is PREjudgment interest (accruing before entry of judgment) and is separate from Ohio’s post-judgment rate; availability is limited by claim type (see the page). Current formula value as of 2026-01-01; verify at codes.ohio.gov. Not legal advice.
